summary: Comprehensive testing of Staylet Phase 3 features completed. All 24 backend tests passed (2 skipped due to no notifications). Frontend UI testing verified all new features: Tasks CRUD with recurring support, notification dropdown, dashboard improvements with overdue alerts and upcoming expiries/tasks sections, Settings notification preferences with reminder timing selector.
passed_tests: Backend: Tasks CRUD - create, read, update, delete
Backend: Task validation - empty/whitespace title rejected (400)
Backend: Task status change (pending -> in_progress -> completed)
Backend: Task filtering by status, priority, property
Backend: Recurring task creation with recurrence_pattern
Backend: Completing recurring task creates next occurrence
Backend: Task templates endpoint returns 10 predefined templates
Backend: Notifications - get list, get unread only
Backend: Notifications - generate notifications endpoint
Backend: Notifications - mark all as read
Backend: User preferences - get and update
Backend: Dashboard stats includes tasks_due, tasks_due_this_month, unread_notifications
Backend: Dashboard data endpoint returns upcoming_expiries, overdue_records, tasks_due_this_month
Backend: Constants include task_statuses, task_priorities, task_categories, notification_types
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 5 stat cards (Properties, Expiring Soon, Overdue, Missing, Tasks Due)
Frontend: Dashboard shows overdue alert section with immediate attention warning
Frontend: Dashboard shows Next 5 Expiries section
Frontend: Dashboard shows Tasks Due This Month section
Frontend: Notification bell in header opens dropdown
Frontend: Quick Actions section with Create Task button
Frontend: Tasks page loads with filters (status, priority, property)
Frontend: Task modal opens with all fields (title, description, due date, priority, category, property, recurring)
Frontend: Task creation works and task card appears
Frontend: Settings page has Profile, Notifications, Security tabs
Frontend: Settings > Notifications has in-app and email toggles
Frontend: Settings > Notifications has reminder timing selector (90/60/30/14/7 days)
Frontend: Settings > Notifications shows 'Coming soon' badge for email reminders (MOCKED)
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 features verified: Tasks CRUD with recurring support, notification dropdown in header, dashboard improvements with overdue alert section and upcoming expiries/tasks cards, Settings notification preferences with reminder timing. Email reminders are MOCKED (UI toggle exists with 'Coming soon' badge but no actual email sending). Existing test data: 2 properties, compliance records with 1 expiring soon and 1 overdue, 1 recurring task 'Test Smoke Alarms'.

mocked_features.email_reminders: UI toggle exists with 'Coming soon' badge, preference is saved but no actual email sending

tasks_crud.create: Works with title, description, due_date, priority, category, property_id, is_recurring, recurrence_pattern
tasks_crud.read: List with filters (status, priority, property, filter_type)

recurring_tasks.completion: Completing a recurring task creates next occurrence with updated due_date

notifications.dropdown: Bell icon in header shows unread count, opens dropdown with notifications
notifications.generation: /api/notifications/generate creates reminders based on compliance expiry dates

dashboard_improvements.overdue_alert: Red section showing overdue items needing immediate attention
dashboard_improvements.upcoming_expiries: Next 5 expiries card with days until expiry
dashboard_improvements.tasks_due_this_month: Tasks card showing tasks due this month

settings_notifications.email_toggle: Toggle for email reminders (MOCKED with 'Coming soon' badge)
settings_notifications.reminder_timing: Selectable buttons for 90/60/30/14/7 days before expiry
